name: lexframe
description: Stage 1 multi-tenant foundation for the LexFrame legal automation platform.

scripts.check:backend: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend test
scripts.check:frontend: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web test
scripts.check:contracts: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/contracts build && corepack pnpm validate:openapi && corepack pnpm validate:json-schemas && corepack pnpm validate:example-workflows && corepack pnpm validate:release-manifest
scripts.check:activepieces: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/activepieces-legal-pieces lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/activepieces-legal-pieces typecheck && corepack pnpm validate:activepieces-package
scripts.check:security: corepack pnpm validate:stage1-security && corepack pnpm validate:stage11-security && corepack pnpm validate:web-bundle-secrets && corepack pnpm secret-scan
scripts.check: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm check:contracts && corepack pnpm check:backend && corepack pnpm check:frontend && corepack pnpm check:db && corepack pnpm check:ai && corepack pnpm check:activepieces && corepack pnpm check:security && corepack pnpm check:e2e
